headline: Comedy's Wildest Trio Joins Forces in 'Synergy Systems'
lede: Eric André is assembling an off-kilter comedy dream team with Will Forte and Tiffany Haddish set to headline the anarchic action-comedy 'Synergy Systems'.
body:
## Hollywood's Comedic Outlaws Converge

The upcoming action-comedy 'Synergy Systems' promises to deliver a high-octane dose of unpredictable humor by uniting three of comedy's most fearless performers. Eric André, known for his surrealist comedy and boundary-pushing approach, will star alongside comedy veterans Will Forte and Tiffany Haddish in what appears to be a genre-bending project.

First-time feature director Toby Harvard, previously recognized for his screenwriting work, will helm the project. The film's sales launch at the Cannes Film Market suggests significant industry anticipation for this unconventional comedic collaboration.

André's involvement signals the project will likely veer into absurdist territory, given his reputation for subversive comedy. Forte, celebrated for his work on 'MacGruber' and 'Last Man on Earth', brings his trademark deadpan sensibility, while Haddish's explosive comedic energy completes the trio's potential for cinematic chaos.

Cinetic Media and WME Independent are managing the film's market presence, indicating robust behind-the-scenes support for this potentially groundbreaking comedic venture.
key_facts: Eric André, Will Forte, and Tiffany Haddish star
Directed by first-time feature filmmaker Toby Harvard
Launching sales at Cannes Film Market
